introSection: Sky Loop is a steel launched roller coaster at Riyadh Winter Wonderland in Riyadh, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. It opened on 21 January 2022.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Sky Loop is a Sky Rocket II from Premier Rides.

fullText:
Sky Loop is a steel launched roller coaster at Riyadh Winter Wonderland in Riyadh, Ar Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. It opened on 21 January 2022.

Sky Loop is a Sky Rocket II from Premier Rides.
